content:
c_checker第三批漏报/误报修复请求（基于经典CWE漏洞测试，2026-06-28）：

## 经典CWE漏洞测试结果：13/21检测正确，5漏报，3误报

### 漏报（5个，已发送修复请求）
1. CWE-327: 弱加密算法(DES/RC4/MD5) - 无检测规则
2. CWE-457: 未初始化变量 - 仅检测指针不检测普通变量
3. CWE-195: 有符号到无符号转换 - 无检测规则
4. CWE-369: 除零错误 - 无检测规则
5. CWE-733: 编译器优化移除安全检查 - 无检测规则

### 误报（2个，已发送修复请求）
6. CWE-190: alloc_size_overflow误报 - 有溢出检查的malloc仍被报
7. CWE-170: strncpy/strncat误报 - 有显式NULL终止仍被报

### 检测正确的CWE（13个）
CWE-120(gets), CWE-134(格式化字符串), CWE-78(命令注入), CWE-416(UAF), CWE-415(double free), CWE-476(NULL解引用), CWE-190(整数溢出-有误报), CWE-367(TOCTOU), CWE-22(路径遍历), CWE-377(不安全临时文件), CWE-338(不安全随机数), CWE-732(过宽权限), CWE-676(危险函数), CWE-401(内存泄漏)

### 测试用例位置
- tests/jarvis_sec/datasets/vulnerability_gaps/cwe327_weak_crypto/
- tests/jarvis_sec/datasets/vulnerability_gaps/cwe457_uninitialized_var/
- tests/jarvis_sec/datasets/vulnerability_gaps/cwe195_signed_to_unsigned/
- tests/jarvis_sec/datasets/vulnerability_gaps/cwe369_divide_by_zero/
- tests/jarvis_sec/datasets/vulnerability_gaps/cwe733_compiler_security/
- tests/jarvis_sec/datasets/vulnerability_gaps/cwe190_fp_safe_check/
- tests/jarvis_sec/datasets/vulnerability_gaps/cwe170_strncpy_nullterm_fp/

### 规则开发Agent ID: f0000a52-207d-4962-b912-4c65de02ec5d
### 状态：修复请求已发送，等待完成
